characters.appearance: Young adult male, slim build, light complexion, short dark hair. Clean-shaven.
characters.demeanor: Focused while working, then enthusiastic when addressing the camera.

scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the core problem: struggling to type or translate English vs speaking it effortlessly.
- Uses the split-screen visual to contrast hesitation with confidence.
- Sets up the payoff for using Supernova's AI practice.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Typing English vs Speaking Fluently
Hey Jack! I really enjoyed our lunch meet the other day. Do you think we can setup another one for Thursday or Friday?
Supernova AI Practice
Confident ✅

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: Supernova के साथ बिना डरे English बोलना सीखो। [Learn to speak English without fear with Supernova.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers a direct, encouraging call to action.
- Positions Supernova as the tool to overcome speaking fear.
- Ends on a warm, supportive note.
